input.tenant_message: A mold test kit from my apartment after my landlord told me they 'cleaned' the mold by putting bleach on the spots. The petri dish is completely covered in mold growth — the bleach did nothing to fix the underlying problem.

ai_output.recommended_action: Professional mold remediation required immediately. Bleach surface treatment is insufficient — mold test confirms active severe contamination. Identify and fix moisture source. Full mold assessment by certified inspector needed. Tenant may need temporary relocation depending on severity. This is a habitability violation.

source.post_title: A mold test kit from my apartment after my landlord told me they "cleaned" the mold by putting bleach on the spots
